vol_name: Infant-Directed Communication: Examining the multimodal dynamics of infants’ everyday interactions with caregivers
vol_description:
This dataset includes 21 videos depicting caregivers and infants engaged in free play at home. A total of 44 caregivers and infants are included in the associated study and manuscript, however only 21 gave permission for sharing on Databrary.

Videos were recorded via Zoom and are uploaded as .mp4 files.

At time of recording, all infants were between 18 and 24 months of age.

Coding manuals and associated ELAN templates are available on the OSF page associated with this work: https://osf.io/u5avz/

The associated paper is currently under review.
These are the videos from the Princeton Baby Lab's IDCxContext study to be used by Dr. John Franchak and researchers in his lab.
